analysis: The project appears to be a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for a test website, GitHub page, and docs. The theme should focus on black holes, animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The current theme likely needs enhancement to fully capture the cosmic and dynamic nature of black holes.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with cosmic animations, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and dynamic transitions to represent black holes and space phenomena.
Add more interactive and animated sections to the HTML, such as a black hole simulation, animated slides about black hole facts, and a cosmic navigation menu.
Implement JavaScript functions to control the animations, such as a black hole animation, slide transitions, and interactive elements that respond to user actions.
